sections.title: Set as Preferred Source on Google

content.text: MDU DDE 2nd / 3rd Year Admission Jan-Feb Session 2025 : Here You Can Get All The Current And Upcoming Information Related To MDU DDE 2nd / 3rd Year Admission 2025. Like Admission News, Important Dates, MDU DDE 2nd / 3rd Year Admission 2025 Application Fees, Qualification, Syllabus, MDU DDE 2nd / 3rd Year Admission 2025 Exam Pattern, Exam Date, Admit Card, Result, MDU DDE 2nd / 3rd Year Admission 2025 Question Paper and More.

rows.text: Maharshi Dayanand University (MDU), Rohtak (HR) Distance 2nd / 3rd Year Admission Jan-Feb Session 2025 MDU DDE Admission 2025 Short Details Of Notification WWW.

Form Starting Date : 17/01/2025 Last Date (No Late Fee) : 10/02/2025 11:59 PM Last Date (1000 Late Fee) : 28/02/2025 11:59 PM Last Date (2000 Late Fee) : 15/03/2025 11:59 PM Last Date (3000 Late Fee) : 31/03/2025 11:59 PM Written Exam Date : July 2025

MDU DDE 2nd / 3rd Year Admission 2025 Application Steps :- Read The Notification : First of All Read the Complete Official Notification Carefully and Check Application Fees, Important Dates Etc. Collect Required Documents : Collect The Required Documents Like Eligibility Proof, Photo, Signature, Identity Proof, Address Details and All The Basic Information For Application. Prepare Scanned Documents : Scan The Documents You Have Collected, Including Your Photo, Signature, Identity Proof, Address Details and All Others in the Specified Format. Fill The Application Form : Fill out the Form With Accurate & Updated Information. While Filling The Form, Double Check All The Columns Whether All Your Information is Entered Correctly. Check Application Preview : Before Final Submission, Please Preview Your Application Form. Verify That All Details Provided are Accurate and Complete. After This Go To The Next Step. Pay The Application Fees : If Any Fee is Applicable for the Application, Follow The Instructions to Make The Payment. Payment Can be Made Online / Offline as per the Given Steps. Submit Application Form : Once You Have Reviewed The Application Form and Made The Required Fees Payments, Submit the Final Application Form as per the Instructions Given. Print Final Application Form : Follow All The Instructions & After Successfully Submitting Your Application Form, Do Not Forget to Take a Printout Of The Final Submitted Form For Your Records.
